mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, init_score, vip_bonus_rate, lianghao_bonus_rate, price, score_info
mapper.select:
select
from t_credit_score_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from t_credit_score_config where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1
